title: Mojibake / encoding issue in file content
description: Files with non-ASCII characters (Russian, special symbols) may display incorrectly if encoding is not explicitly set to UTF-8
symptoms: Russian text appears as garbage characters
Special symbols replaced with ???? or boxes
JSON parsing fails on non-ASCII content
root_cause: File opened without explicit encoding='utf-8' parameter

fix.description: Always specify encoding when opening files
steps: For JSON: json.load(f) after open with encoding
fix.code_example:
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

prevention.precheck_rule: Scan for open() without encoding parameter
